qa_pairs.question: Who organizes most of the workshops available?
qa_pairs.answer: Most workshops are organized by the Alliance's regional partners.

qa_pairs.question: What types of training opportunities are offered?
qa_pairs.answer: Both online and in-person training opportunities are available, covering a wide variety of subjects and different levels of sophistication.

qa_pairs.question: Which regional partners provide training calendars and websites?
qa_pairs.answer: WestDRI, SHARCNET, SciNet, Calcul Québec, and ACENET are the regional partners providing training calendars and websites.

qa_pairs.question: Where can I find WestDRI training materials and upcoming sessions?
qa_pairs.answer: You can find WestDRI training materials, including upcoming sessions and recorded webinars, on their Training Materials website at [https://training.westdri.ca].

qa_pairs.question: Are there videos available from previous WestDRI training sessions?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, the UAlberta ARC Bootcamp, associated with WestDRI, offers videos of previous sessions available at [https://www.ualberta.ca/information-services-and-technology/research-computing/bootcamps.html].

qa_pairs.question: How can I access SHARCNET's training resources?
qa_pairs.answer: You can access SHARCNET's training resources through their Training Events Calendar at [https://www.sharcnet.ca/my/news/calendar], their YouTube Channel at [http://youtube.sharcnet.ca/], and their Online Workshops at [https://training.sharcnet.ca/].

qa_pairs.question: What educational resources does SciNet offer?
qa_pairs.answer: SciNet offers an Education Site at [https://education.scinet.utoronto.ca] and a YouTube Channel at [https://www.youtube.com/c/SciNetHPCattheUniversityofToronto].

qa_pairs.question: Where can I find information about Calcul Québec workshops and training?
qa_pairs.answer: Calcul Québec workshops are available at [https://calculquebec.eventbrite.ca/], and general training information can be found at [https://www.calculquebec.ca/en/academic-research-services/training/].

qa_pairs.question: What training information and channels does ACENET provide?
qa_pairs.answer: ACENET provides training information at [https://www.ace-net.ca/training.html] and has a YouTube Channel at [https://www.youtube.com/@ACENETDRI].

qa_pairs.question: Is there a centralized list of all upcoming training events?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, a complete and merged list of upcoming training events can be found on Explora at [https://explora.alliancecan.ca/events].
